messages.content: 翻译：新的CRM项目可能会和总部的CRM计划中部分内容重叠
The new CRM project may overlap with some of the contents in the headquarters' CRM plan.
翻译：未来项目的运维和升级需要依靠外部
The operation and upgrade of the future project will rely on external support.
翻译：目前revilia电商平台没有CRM系统可用于客户数据分析，包括数据分析，会员管理，优惠券管理，市场分析等
Currently, the Revilia e-commerce platform does not have a CRM system available for customer data analysis, including data analysis, member management, coupon management, market analysis, and so on.
翻译：目前缺乏管理系统可以处理销售数据分析，对电商销售管理没有可靠的数据模型
Currently, there is a lack of management system to handle sales data analysis, and there is no reliable data model for e-commerce sales management.
翻译：目前缺乏管理系统可以进行客户数据分析，或对客户进行分类管理
Currently, there is a lack of management system to conduct customer data analysis or to categorize and manage customers.
目前缺乏管理系统可以进行会员信息，以及对会员级别和权益进行分类
Currently, there is a lack of management system to handle member information and to categorize member level and rights.
翻译：缺乏管理系统可以管理优惠券设置，优惠券定向发放，折扣活动管理等
There is a lack of management system to manage coupon settings, directional distribution of coupons, discount activity management, and so on.
翻译：缺乏管理系统可以进行市场分析，包括竞品数据分析
There is a lack of management system to conduct market analysis, including competitor data analysis.
翻译：目前缺少一个功能
Currently missing a function.
翻译：AM缺少系统支持
AM lacks system support.
